programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will worries that Grace behaves more like a wife than an old friend.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace pose as millionaires while visiting the townhouse of Sandra Bernhard.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Sports-challenged Will tries to impress his new friend (Patrick Dempsey) with his athletic skills.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is torn over ending his newfound relationship with Matt, a rising TV sportscaster.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace has Will sell her dead uncle's car to a nun (Ellen DeGeneres), then wants it back.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace catches Will's philandering father on the arm of a stranger.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace is shocked when she catches Will's philandering father on the arm of a glamorous stranger.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen tries to keep Grace from dating her attractive nephew, Sumner.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace compromises Will's weekly poker sessions with the guys.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace buys a piano in hope of strengthening her friendship with Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) attempts to get rid of her slovenly new neighbor (guest star Woody Harrelson).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Guilty Grace drags Will to the funeral of classmate she once tormented.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tries to keep secret her embarrassing romance with a slovenly neighbor.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tries to mediate between Will and new-tenant Nathan (Woody Harrelson).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tries to mediate between Will and new-tenant Nathan (Woody Harrelson).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Nathan (Woody Harrelson) feels neglected when Will and Grace resume their chummy friendship.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will suffers flashbacks when a childhood bully (Adam Goldberg) is hired by his law firm.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack coerces Grace into posing as his son Elliot's date to a school dance.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace moves into Karen's apartment to help her worried friend.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack arranges a date between his smitten supervisor (Parker Posey) and unsuspecting Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Nathan's marriage proposal doesn't fulfill Grace's childhood fantasy, and she finds it dispiriting.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will, Jack and Karen try to cheer Grace, who is depressed after losing Nathan.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace back different candidates for the upcoming mayoral election.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day, the friends band together for a motor tour of their dysfunctional families.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving Day, the friends band together for a motor tour of their dysfunctional families.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: At the gym, Will sees a man who seems familiar.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Retailer Barney's hires Grace to decorate the display windows for the holidays.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace schemes to hook up the mistress of Will's father with another man.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace rediscovers a handsome high-school friend who's doing time.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace reveals her ex-boyfriend's faults at his wedding rehearsal.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack uses Grace to defeat a rival for a spot in a gay men's chorus.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace illegally sublet their old flat to finance their new large apartment.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace move into their dream apartment but find that they miss their old one.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will presents his parents with a cruise for their anniversary.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace accidentally beheads Will's beloved garden gnome.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack learns he missed his son's first kiss with a girl student.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will persuades Grace to help plan the wedding for his visiting friends.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will goes under cover with a sociable detective after his laptop computer is ripped off.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will takes Grace to pose for an eccentric, celebrity photographer (Glenn Close).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Aware that time is passing, Will asks Grace to become the mother of his baby.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace vacillate on artificial or natural conception; Jack gets career advice from Cher.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace vacillate on artificial or natural conception; Jack gets career advice from Cher.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A dashing doctor on horseback rescues Grace; Karen debates cheating on her imprisoned husband.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack lands his dream job when Kevin Bacon hires him to find out who has been harassing him.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Smitten with her new beau, Grace reconsiders having a baby with Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen and Jack hatch a plan to end Will and Grace's ongoing feud.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Leo (Harry Connick Jr.) drags Grace along on a scary cycling trip through the autumn countryside.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's aggressive new boss orders him to fire his friend.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace uses saucy language when meeting Leo's parents.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace gets cold feet as her wedding to Leo (Harry Connick Jr.) nears.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is uneasy about the whole idea of Grace marrying Leo (Harry Connick, Jr.).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will invites Karen to move in with him; Elton John is arbiter for gay style.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace has only two tickets to "The Nutcracker" and cannot decide whether to take Will or Leo.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack convinces Will to join a soccer team.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace is puzzled by her new neighbor -- a bizarre bohemian woman.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Jack coach Karen's cousin on his new gay lifestyle, reminding Will of his own experiences.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen's rival attempts to manipulate Jack; Will and Grace arrange a night of board games.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen's rival attempts to manipulate Jack; Will and Grace arrange a night of board games.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack encounters his former babysitter (Demi Moore) and lapses into childlike behavior.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Jack's transformation of Karen's cousin Barry is complete; Karen duels with Beverly.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen trades places with Rosario to woo a handyman.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will forms an anti-romance club with Karen and his boss (Gene Wilder).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will attempts to surprise Grace for her birthday by sneaking Leo back from Africa.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen finds a kindred soul while looking for a roommate; Will becomes addicted to painkillers.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen hires a seemingly immature attorney (Macaulay Culkin) to argue against Will in her divorce.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Karen's ex-husband dies, she and her British rival (Minnie Driver) have a contest of wills.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen confronts her ex-husband's mistress before inviting everybody for a ceremony on her yacht.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Jack awake in a precarious position while at sea.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace learns Leo's ex-girlfriend is intimately acquainted with Will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen invites Grace and Leo to play tennis at her exclusive club, but then drives Grace away.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack appears opposite James Earl Jones in a play and gives the veteran actor some pointers.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will helps Leo rediscover his love of the city.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will takes his wheelchair-bound mother for an afternoon stroll.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Unorthodox doctor gives Karen her annual physical.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will urges Grace to remain in New York with him; Karen strong-arms Jack's nursing teacher.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will catches the eye of a female diner after being stood up; Karen bumps into Candice Bergen.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Weak bladder forces Will to entrust Grace with his place in line for Barry Manilow concert tickets.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace's sister launches her latest scheme; Karen spurns Lyle.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A rich plastic surgeon (Hal Linden) tries to buy Will's affection; Grace boycotts a new restaurant.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's client falls for Jack; Grace and Karen discover money in Leo's cabin.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is the only single man in a cooking class full of couples.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace begin a business venture selling apartments.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace try to make money at Jack and Stuart's expense.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Lesbian couple foils Will and Grace's latest real-estate venture.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack spots Stuart taking in a movie matinee with another man.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace advises Will to play hard to get with his new beau.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will introduces his new boyfriend to overly critical Grace.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will snoops to find out if his father is seeing someone new.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack turns to Will for help writing his commencement address.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen moves her wedding to Las Vegas, where Jennifer Lopez agrees to sing at the ceremony.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen moves her wedding to Las Vegas, where Jennifer Lopez agrees to sing at the ceremony.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen wants Jennifer Lopez to listen to her new song.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack wangles his way into Janet Jackson's performance tour as a backup dancer.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: As she attempts to steal doughnuts at an AA meeting, Grace has a surprise reunion with Val.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace accuses Will of being too nice to strangers.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's birthday takes on a new meaning because of his new partner.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will convinces Jack to aid a local gay-bookstore owner to save his store from closing.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace invite Vince and Nadine over for a meet-and-greet.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: After a great date with someone else, Grace gets a garbled message from Leo.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will, Grace, Jack and Karen go on a road trip for Grace's getaway weekend.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Vince's mother cannot make her the holiday feast, so Will volunteers.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will volunteers to make a special holiday meal.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace accidentally breaks a treasured figurine at Will's mother's holiday party.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: An old classmate tries to get revenge on Karen by becoming the president of Walker Inc.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is reluctant to bring Vince to his boss's dinner party.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Scott Woolley (Jeff Goldblum) tries to get Grace to fire Karen.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Although Grace tries to ignore St. Valentine's Day, she winds up with a hunky greeting-card writer.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace drags Will along on her first date with Nick.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will agrees to fire Karen's pastry chef, but he gets involved in a love triangle instead.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack and Will buy an apartment in an up-and-coming gay community.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is jealous when his no-nonsense therapist (Sharon Stone) becomes fast friends with Grace.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace convinces Karen to attend her father's birthday party.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace's near-death experience prompts her to write her will.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Will's writing career fizzles, Malcolm makes him another job offer.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will becomes suspicious of his new job when he finds himself in an empty office.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace contemplates an affair with a married man; Jack begins his new career as a talk-show host.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will suspects that Karen is more upset about Stan being alive than she is letting on.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack learns that Will has never learned how to swim, so he makes it his mission to teach him.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack tells Karen he believes she belongs with Stan, not Malcolm (Alec Baldwin).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack brings Baby Glenn to Will's charity auction and carnival.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace and Will spot her ex-husband, Leo, on their plane to London.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace and Will spot her ex-husband, Leo, on their plane to London.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack's decision to move makes Will take a close look at their friendship.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Grace finds it impossible to please her mother, Jack offers to help.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: The gang spends Christmas at the home of Will's mother.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Excited about an upcoming musical, Grace plans for Will and herself to attend in costume.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will, Grace and Jack embarrass themselves at Karen's party.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's former boss asks Grace to redecorate the law firm.

programme.desc: Will and Grace dread a dinner date with Rob and Ellen.
